title: Garment metadata
description: One meta.json per garment folder: garments/<slug>/{raw/, clean/, meta.json}. Auto-tagged by Claude vision in Phase 5; hand-filled for the 5 benchmark items.

pattern.description: 'solid' | description of print/pattern incl. placement notes

fabric.description: Drives drape language in the try-on prompt, e.g. 'heavyweight cotton', 'chiffon', 'structured wool'

layer_order.description: 0=base (worn against skin), 1=mid, 2=outer. Drives Phase 5 sequential layering.

details_to_preserve.description: Logos, text, button count, neckline shape — checked by auto-QA

brand.description: Label/maker shown as the first line in the archive detail overlay
